resources.string: Enter your MRZ data from the back of your ID card, then hold it near the device
Document number input field. Enter 1 to 9 alphanumeric characters from your ID card.
Date of birth input field. Enter 6 digits in YYMMDD format.
Date of expiry input field. Enter 6 digits in YYMMDD format.
Invalid date. Check month (01-12) and day (01-31)

Find the MRZ data on the back of your Turkish ID card:
- Document Number: First 9 characters
- Date of Birth: YYMMDD format
- Date of Expiry: YYMMDD format
Information card. MRZ Data Location: Find the MRZ data on the back of your Turkish ID card. Document Number is the first 9 characters. Date of Birth and Date of Expiry are in YYMMDD format.
Ready! Hold your ID card near the device
Fill in all MRZ fields to read your card
NFC status: Ready. You can now hold your ID card near the device to read it.
NFC status: Not ready. Please fill in all MRZ fields before scanning your card.
Keep your card near the device
Reading card in progress. Please keep your card near the device.
Loading indicator. Card reading in progress.
Read another card button. Tap to scan a new ID card.
ID card photo section displaying the cardholder\'s photograph.
ID card photograph of the cardholder
Try again button. Tap to retry reading your ID card.

Please enter valid MRZ data:
- Document Number (1-9 characters)
- Date of Birth (YYMMDD)
- Date of Expiry (YYMMDD)

Card connection lost.

✓ Hold your card steady against the device
✓ Don't move the card until reading completes
✓ Try again

Communication error with card.

✓ Ensure your card is touching the NFC area
✓ Remove any metal cases or thick covers
✓ Try cleaning the card surface
✓ Try again

Security error.

✓ Verify your MRZ data is correct
✓ Check document number, birth date, and expiry date
✓ Ensure dates match your ID card exactly

Authentication failed.

✓ Double-check your MRZ data from the card
✓ Verify document number (9 characters)
✓ Verify birth date and expiry date (YYMMDD)
✓ Make sure dates are entered correctly

Card connection interrupted.

✓ Keep the card steady on the device
✓ Don't move until reading completes
✓ Try again

Reading timed out.

✓ Keep the card on the device longer
✓ Ensure good contact with NFC area
✓ Try again

NFC error.

✓ Ensure NFC is enabled in Settings
✓ Check if your device supports NFC
✓ Try restarting NFC in device settings

%1$s

✓ Verify your MRZ data is correct
✓ Try again with the card held steady

Unable to read card.

✓ Check that your MRZ data is correct
✓ Ensure NFC is enabled
✓ Hold the card steady on the device
✓ Try again
Invalid input data. Please check your MRZ data.
MRZ Authentication Data input section. Enter document number, date of birth, and date of expiry from your ID card.
Personal Information. Name: %1$s. TCKN: %2$s. Birth Date: %3$s. Gender: %4$s. Nationality: %5$s. Document Number: %6$s. Issue Date: %7$s. Expiry Date: %8$s. Place of Birth: %9$s.
